testcase.name: test_chest_collision_layers_are_reachable_by_player_rays
testcase.failure: SelectRaycast cannot detect chest, so Hold E never starts opening it. at 'test_chest_collision_layers_are_reachable_by_player_rays' in res://tests/gdunit/chest_test.gd:32
WeaponReachRaycast cannot detect chest, so melee attacks cannot break it. at 'test_chest_collision_layers_are_reachable_by_player_rays' in res://tests/gdunit/chest_test.gd:35
